productDisplayName: John Players Men Stripes Navy Blue Sweater
description: Composition Light, dark and navy blue sweater made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed V-neck, and full sleeves with ribbed cuffs and hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry flat in shade inside out Warm iron Crafted from soft cotton knit fabric and designed with innovative styling, this sweater from john players offers exemplary comfort and a flattering silhouette, which is sure to elevate it into a wardrobe favourite. The abstract pattern in shades of blue ups the energy of this sweater. Team it with jeans or layer it over a T-shirt, and add on sneakers for a sporty look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
